resources.title: Python for Everybody Specialization
resources.why_recommended: Best structured beginner Python course. Covers everything from scratch with great exercises.

resources.title: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python
resources.why_recommended: Practical and project-based. Free online. Great for learning by doing.

resources.title: Python Crash Course
resources.why_recommended: Best Python book for beginners. Clean explanations and real projects.

resources.title: Mathematics for Machine Learning Specialization
resources.why_recommended: Covers all the math you need for ML: linear algebra, calculus, and statistics.

resources.why_recommended: Best free resource for statistics and ML math. Crystal clear explanations.

resources.title: Pandas Documentation - Getting Started Tutorials
resources.why_recommended: Official and always up-to-date. Best first reference for pandas.

resources.title: Data Analysis with Python - freeCodeCamp
resources.why_recommended: Hands-on and completely free. Covers NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib.

resources.title: Kaggle Pandas Course
resources.why_recommended: Quick, interactive, and practical. Great for getting up to speed fast.

resources.title: Data Visualization with Python - Kaggle
resources.why_recommended: Hands-on notebooks covering Seaborn and Matplotlib with real datasets.

resources.title: Plotly & Dash for Python - Udemy
resources.why_recommended: Best course for building interactive dashboards with Plotly and Dash.

resources.title: Machine Learning Specialization
resources.why_recommended: The gold standard ML course. Andrew Ng explains concepts better than anyone.

resources.why_recommended: The most practical ML book. Code-first approach with real projects.

resources.title: Kaggle ML Courses
resources.why_recommended: Free, fast, practical. Great supplement to longer courses.

resources.title: Deep Learning Specialization
resources.why_recommended: The definitive deep learning course. Builds from scratch to CNNs, RNNs, and Transformers.

resources.title: Fast.ai - Practical Deep Learning for Coders
resources.why_recommended: Top-down, practical approach. Get state-of-the-art results quickly, then learn the theory.

resources.title: NLP with HuggingFace Transformers
resources.why_recommended: Official course from the creators of the most used NLP library. Covers BERT, GPT, RAG, and more.

resources.title: Natural Language Processing Specialization
resources.why_recommended: Deep theoretical and practical coverage of NLP from attention to transformers.

resources.title: MLOps Specialization

resources.title: CSS Grid & Flexbox for Responsive Layouts
resources.why_recommended: Focused deep-dive into the two most important CSS layout tools.

resources.why_recommended: The single best JavaScript reference online. Clear, modern, and complete.

resources.why_recommended: Interactive and project-based. Excellent for building JS fundamentals.
